title: Crispy Potato Fritters
description: A Mexican twist on traditional fritters, these crispy potato bites are perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, chopped onion, minced garlic, beaten egg, flour, cumin, chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
Heat 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture into the oil, flattening slightly with a spatula.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Repeat the process with the remaining potato mixture.
Serve crispy potato fritters immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
